mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_INVENTORY WHERE ASSET_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYSTEM_ASSET_INVENTORY ( ASSET_ID, ASSET_TYPE, ASSET_NAME, ASSET_VERSION, SOURCE_PATH, SOURCE_SYMBOL, CONTENT_HASH, ASSET_FAMILY, OWNER_DOMAIN, OWNER_SCOPE, OPERATOR_OWNER, SERVICE_OWNER, CRITICALITY, HEALTH_STATUS, LAST_SCAN_AT, ACTIVE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{assetId}, #{assetType}, #{assetName}, #{assetVersion}, #{sourcePath}, #{sourceSymbol}, #{contentHash}, #{assetFamily}, #{ownerDomain}, #{ownerScope}, #{operatorOwner}, #{serviceOwner}, #{criticality}, #{healthStatus}, #{lastScanAt}, #{activeYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYSTEM_ASSET_INVENTORY SET ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType}, ASSET_NAME = #{assetName}, ASSET_VERSION = #{assetVersion}, SOURCE_PATH = #{sourcePath}, SOURCE_SYMBOL = #{sourceSymbol}, CONTENT_HASH = #{contentHash}, ASSET_FAMILY = #{assetFamily}, OWNER_DOMAIN = #{ownerDomain}, OWNER_SCOPE = #{ownerScope}, OPERATOR_OWNER = #{operatorOwner}, SERVICE_OWNER = #{serviceOwner}, CRITICALITY = #{criticality}, HEALTH_STATUS = #{healthStatus}, LAST_SCAN_AT = #{lastScanAt}, ACTIVE_YN = #{activeYn}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE ASSET_ID = #{assetId}
mapper.select: SELECT COMPOSITION_ID AS compositionId, PARENT_ASSET_ID AS parentAssetId, CHILD_ASSET_ID AS childAssetId, RELATION_TYPE AS relationType, MAPPING_NOTES AS mappingNotes, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_COMPOSITION WHERE PARENT_ASSET_ID = #{value}

SELECT COMPOSITION_ID AS compositionId, PARENT_ASSET_ID AS parentAssetId, CHILD_ASSET_ID AS childAssetId, RELATION_TYPE AS relationType, MAPPING_NOTES AS mappingNotes, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_COMPOSITION WHERE CHILD_ASSET_ID = #{value}

SELECT SCAN_ID AS scanId, ASSET_ID AS assetId, PREVIOUS_HASH AS previousHash, CURRENT_HASH AS currentHash, SCAN_RESULT AS scanResult, SCAN_DETAILS AS scanDetails, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_SCAN_LOG WHERE ASSET_ID = #{value} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_INVENTORY WHERE OWNER_DOMAIN IS NULL OR OWNER_DOMAIN = '') AS missingOwnerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_INVENTORY WHERE CRITICALITY IS NULL OR CRITICALITY = '') AS missingCriticalityCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_INVENTORY WHERE HEALTH_STATUS = 'DRIFTED') AS driftedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_INVENTORY a WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_COMPOSITION c WHERE c.PARENT_ASSET_ID = a.ASSET_ID OR c.CHILD_ASSET_ID = a.ASSET_ID)) AS orphanCount

SELECT * FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_INVENTORY a
AND (OWNER_DOMAIN IS NULL OR OWNER_DOMAIN = '')
AND (CRITICALITY IS NULL OR CRITICALITY = '')
AND HEALTH_STATUS = 'DRIFTED'
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_COMPOSITION c WHERE c.PARENT_ASSET_ID = a.ASSET_ID OR c.CHILD_ASSET_ID = a.ASSET_ID)
ORDER BY ASSET_TYPE ASC, ASSET_NAME ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE SYSTEM_ASSET_LIFECYCLE_PLAN SET PLAN_STATUS = #{status}, APPROVER_ID = #{approverId}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId}
mapper.select: SELECT EVIDENCE_ID AS evidenceId, PLAN_ID AS planId, CHECKPOINT_KEY AS checkpointKey, EVIDENCE_TYPE AS evidenceType, EVIDENCE_VALUE AS evidenceValue, VERIFIED_BY AS verifiedBy, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM SYSTEM_ASSET_LIFECYCLE_EVIDENCE WHERE PLAN_ID = #{value} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
